# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14
##### § 405-A — Application of article

The provisions of the succeeding sections of this article shall take effect when this state enters into an agreement pursuant to the authority granted in § 405 (Authority to enter into agreements) and shall remain in effect only so long as this state is a party to such an agreement.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
